footer.tagline: Be visible in the AI era.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know
faq.q1_q: What does the free analysis include?
faq.q1_a: The free analysis provides a basic SEO score, performance metrics (LCP, CLS), DNS check, and a few critical recommendations. It can only be used once per domain.
faq.q2_q: When will my paid report be delivered?
faq.q2_a: Once payment is confirmed, analysis starts automatically. After scanning 20+ metrics, your report is sent to your email within 5-10 minutes.
faq.q3_a: Payments are processed via Stripe and PayPal infrastructure. Your card details are never stored on GeoSerra servers.
faq.q4_q: Are my access credentials safe with the implementation service?
faq.q4_a: Your cPanel or SSH credentials are used only during the task and are not saved to our database. We recommend changing your password after the task is complete.
faq.q5_a: Visibility and citability analysis is performed for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT web search, Perplexity AI, and Bing Copilot.
faq.q6_a: When the report is ready it is sent to your email as a PDF. You can also track its status at /report/[id] and download the PDF directly from there.

cta.title: Get Visible in AI Search
cta.description: Find out today why your site isn't appearing in ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI. Free analysis takes just 2 minutes.

report.impl_cta: Want us to apply the changes from your report?

about.title: About Us
about.intro: GeoSerra is a GEO SEO analysis platform built to help websites become more visible in AI-powered search engines.
about.ai_desc: Custom analysis metrics for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT and Perplexity
about.mission_desc: Make AI search visibility accessible to businesses of all sizes
about.speed_desc: Analysis in 2 minutes, PDF report in 10 minutes
about.body: GeoSerra was built by a team that noticed SEO is changing with AI. Traditional SEO tools don't adequately cover platforms like Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT web search and Perplexity. We're here to fill that gap.
